---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or extension for YAF
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

<!--
Describe the user-facing or research problem first. "I want to design a
patch antenna" or "I want a Pareto-front of bandwidth vs gain" or
"I want a faster surrogate for the inner loop of the Yagi case".
Don't jump to the implementation yet.
-->

## Proposed solution

<!--
Optional but useful. Sketch the API / module / adapter you'd like to
see. If you have a working prototype branch, link it.
-->

## Alternatives considered

<!--
Anything you ruled out and why. This is often the most useful section.
-->

## How does this fit alongside existing modules?

<!--
Please cite the closest existing piece (e.g. yaf_ai/optimization/bayesian.py,
yaf_solvers/nec2_adapter/, scripts/case_yagi.py). If your proposal would
displace or duplicate one of those, say so explicitly.
-->

## What would the acceptance look like?

<!--
What command, plot, or measurement would convince a reviewer that the
feature actually works? The codebase prefers physics-truth assertions
("R within ±15 % of textbook 73 Ω") over structural ones ("returns a
SimulationResult object").
-->

## Are you willing to send a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I plan to implement this.
- [ ] No, I'm suggesting it for the maintainers.
- [ ] Maybe — depends on guidance.
